creator: evms@cs.bu.edu
text:
This document describes the Jail source code, describing how it works
in both userland and kernel space. I wrote this a while ago, it
has been on DaemonNews, in the September issue, just this weekend, (because i'm out of school), I turned it into DocBook format.
I have included it here, but you can also download it from http://www.sekt7.org/jailint.uue
